basic_details.job_title: NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 8 Medical Officer BAMS Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with BAMS qualification can directly attend the interview on 02-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years. Age Relaxation: Reserved category candidates can avail of age relaxation up to 43 years.

qualification.details: BAMS Degree from a recognized university. Maharashtra Council of Indian Medical Registration is mandatory. Experience in government/private sector is preferred.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 - Overview
NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NMMC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: BAMS Degree from a recognized university. Maharashtra Council of Indian Medical Registration is mandatory. Experience in government/private sector is preferred.

content_sections.heading: NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NMMC Medical Officer BAMS Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the NMMC Medical Officer BAMS walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Officer BAMS posts in NMMC is scheduled for 02nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Medical Officer BAMS post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Medical Officer BAMS post, candidates must possess a BAMS Degree from a recognized university and have a valid Maharashtra Council of Indian Medical Registration. Experience in government or private sectors is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 38 years. However, candidates belonging to reserved categories can avail of age relaxation up to 43 years as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer BAMS position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Medical Officer BAMS position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 40,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer BAMS post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer BAMS post by the Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NMMC Medical Officer BAMS recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the NMMC Medical Officer BAMS recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation premises. The exact venue address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including educational certificates, BAMS degree, registration certificate, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and passport-size photographs, along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Medical Officer BAMS positions announced by NMMC are on a contractual basis. This offers a temporary employment opportunity in a government organization.
